Fgro f Pt o MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE (Department,of Agriculture and Co-operation) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th April, 2012 S.0.929(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) read with sub-section (6) of Section 12 of the Protection of Plant Varieties and Fanners’ Rights Act, 2001 (53 of 2001),the Protection of Plant Varieties and Farmers’ Rights Authority hereby establishes branch offices of the Plant Varieties Registry at the places specified in column (2) of the Table below and defines the territorial limits of the siad branch offices as specified in column (3) of the said Table, TABLE SI. Place of the branch No. office Territorial limits . (1) C) (3) 1. Ranchi (Branch office) The States of Jharkhand, Bihar, West Bengal, Chattisgarh Orissa and Andaman and Nicobar Islands. 2, Guwahati (Branch office) The States of Assam, Sikkim, Meghalaya, Manipur, Mizoram, Nagaland Tripura and Aruna- chal Pradesh. [F.No. i -6/2011 -SD-V] S. K. G. RAH ATE, Jt.
